claim: Current five-child decomposition already implements the pt-04 P0 split; correctness fixes are in sibling 002-feedback-p0-correctness, which is the hard dependency for 001-aggregator.
relation-coverage.ts DEFAULT_RELATION_TARGETS (relation share/count floors) should be checked before inserting new causal edges from session-trace reducer; adds ~20 LOC.
stage4-filter.ts STATE_LIMITS constants (HOT=50,WARM=30,COLD=20,DORMANT=10,ARCHIVED=5) should be imported by retention reducer rather than redeclared; adds ~5 LOC.

ccc-feedback.ts (append-only JSONL handler) cited by pt-04 is absent from current mcp_server; feedback infrastructure now lives in feedback-ledger.ts (SQLite, 349 LOC); 001-aggregator spec correctly targets feedback_events table.
Soft dependency on eval (028/004, 028/006) is correctly placed at parent level; P0 correctness gating via sibling 002 means learning reducers do not block on eval evidence.
